task_name: Add Scope Resolver Fixture Coverage Map
goal: Add a Scope Resolver fixture coverage map and a local consistency test so documented MVP cases stay aligned with golden fixtures.
claims: BP-047 documents current Scope Resolver fixture coverage.
BP-047 adds a coverage-map consistency test to catch fixture/doc drift.
BP-047 does not change Scope Resolver runtime behavior or fixtures.
assumptions: BP-045 introduced the first Scope Resolver golden fixtures.
BP-046 made the shared review suite the local reviewer entry point.
Coverage visibility should be added before expanding toward Builder task contracts.
dod: docs/SCOPE_RESOLVER_FIXTURE_COVERAGE_v0.md exists and lists the current fixture cases.
